abort.no_devices_found: No connectable BLE devices found nearby.

error.invalid_format: Invalid input format. Please check UUID or hex values.
error.notify_uuid_required: Notify UUID is required when using notify patterns or status query command.

user.title: Select BLE Device
user.description: Select the BLE device you want to control.

type.title: Select Entity Type
type.description: Choose the type of entity to create.

switch.title: Switch Configuration
switch.description: Enter BLE GATT Service/Characteristic info and ON/OFF data.

data_description.service_uuid: BLE service UUID found in nRF Connect or similar tool
data_description.char_uuid: Write characteristic UUID to send data to
data_description.data_on: Hex data to send when turning ON (e.g. 0aa5010101)
data_description.data_off: Hex data to send when turning OFF (e.g. 0aa5010100)
data_description.keep_alive: Auto-reconnect every 60s to keep connection alive while HA is running

button.title: Button Configuration
button.description: Enter BLE GATT Service/Characteristic info and command data.

data_description.service_uuid: BLE service UUID found in nRF Connect or similar tool
data_description.char_uuid: Write characteristic UUID to send data to
data_description.data_press: Hex data to send when button is pressed
data_description.keep_alive: Auto-reconnect every 60s to keep connection alive while HA is running

select.title: Select Configuration
select.description:
Enter BLE GATT Service/Characteristic info and options.
Format: 'label=hexdata', one per line.

data_description.service_uuid: BLE service UUID found in nRF Connect or similar tool
data_description.char_uuid: Write characteristic UUID to send data to
data_description.options: One per line in 'label=hexdata' format (e.g. Mode1=0aa501)
data_description.keep_alive: Auto-reconnect every 60s to keep connection alive while HA is running

notify.title: Notify Configuration (Optional)
notify.description: Use Notify to detect the actual ON/OFF state of the device. Leave empty to skip.

data_description.notify_uuid: Characteristic UUID with Notify property (find in nRF Connect)
data_description.notify_on_pattern: Hex pattern in Notify response when device is ON (e.g. 0101)
data_description.notify_off_pattern: Hex pattern in Notify response when device is OFF (e.g. 0100)
data_description.status_query_data: Command sent to device on connect to query current state (e.g. 0aa501ff). Auto-sent when Keep Alive is enabled

error.invalid_format: Invalid input format. Please check UUID or hex values.
error.notify_uuid_required: Notify UUID is required when using notify patterns or status query command.

switch_options.title: Switch Settings
switch_options.description: Change ON/OFF data and Notify settings.

data_description.data_on: Hex data to send when turning ON (e.g. 0aa5010101)
data_description.data_off: Hex data to send when turning OFF (e.g. 0aa5010100)
data_description.keep_alive: Auto-reconnect every 60s to keep connection alive while HA is running
data_description.notify_on_pattern: Hex pattern in Notify response when device is ON (e.g. 0101)
data_description.notify_off_pattern: Hex pattern in Notify response when device is OFF (e.g. 0100)
data_description.status_query_data: Command sent on connect to query state (e.g. 0aa501ff). Auto-sent with Keep Alive

data_description.data_press: Hex data to send when button is pressed
data_description.keep_alive: Auto-reconnect every 60s to keep connection alive while HA is running
Auto-reconnect every 60s to keep connection alive while HA is running
